LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT WALKER HAMILTON & WHITE'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION. PLAINTIFF MUST PLEAD 3RD PARTY BENEFICIARY STATUS WITH MORE PARTICULARITY AND HIGHLIGHT CONTRACT TERMS THAT SUPPORT THIS THEORY. THE FILED COPY OF THE COMPLAINT DOES NOT INCLUDE A COPY OF THE WRITTEN CONTRACT. PLAINTIFF'S 3RD PARTY BENEFICIARY-COMMUNITY PROPERTY THEORY WAS PREVIOUSLY REJECTED BY THIS COURT AND IS AGAIN REJECTED. PREVAILING PARTY TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: LORETTA M. GIORGI, REPORTER: KARLA ELLIS-DAVIS, CSR #12998

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Mar-03-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT WALKER HAMILTON & WHITE'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. No appearances. The court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: demurrer is sustained with leave to amend all causes of action. Plaintiff must plead 3rd party beneficiary status with more particularity and highlight contract terms that support this theory. The filed copy of the complaint does not include a copy of the written contract. Plaintiff's 3rd party beneficiary-community property theory was previously rejected by this court and is again rejected. Prevailing party to submit a proposed form of order. (302/LMG) Judge: Loretta M. Giorgi, Reporter: Karla Ellis-Davis, CSR #12998
